tasks.task_description: Record parts or materials used and order or requisition new parts or materials, as necessary.
Clean, lubricate, or adjust parts, equipment, or machinery.
Analyze test results, machine error messages, or information obtained from operators to diagnose equipment problems.
Operate newly repaired machinery or equipment to verify the adequacy of repairs.
Observe and test the operation of machinery or equipment to diagnose malfunctions, using voltmeters or other testing devices.
Repair or maintain the operating condition of industrial production or processing machinery or equipment.
Examine parts for defects, such as breakage or excessive wear.
Enter codes and instructions to program computer-controlled machinery.
Disassemble machinery or equipment to remove parts and make repairs.
Study blueprints or manufacturers' manuals to determine correct installation or operation of machinery.
Repair or replace broken or malfunctioning components of machinery or equipment.
Reassemble equipment after completion of inspections, testing, or repairs.
Cut and weld metal to repair broken metal parts, fabricate new parts, or assemble new equipment.
Demonstrate equipment functions and features to machine operators.
